name: incremental-reading-obsidian
description: Leverage spaced repetition to incrementally build understanding and retain knowledge.

scripts.e2e: npm run build && cross-env E2E_CLEANUP=1 npx playwright test --project e2e
scripts.e2e:ui: npm run build && cross-env E2E_CLEANUP=1 npx playwright test --ui --project e2e
scripts.e2e:keep-vaults: npm run build && cross-env E2E_CLEANUP=0 npx playwright test --project e2e
scripts.e2e:repeat: npm run build && cross-env E2E_CLEANUP=1 npx playwright test --project e2e --repeat-each 10
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: Gautam Panakkal <gautampanakkal@gmail.com>
